project_info.aesthetic: Cartier / Aman / Bulgari editorial style. High-contrast, sharp, elegant, no rounded corners.

rules.backgrounds: Alternate between cream and white to separate tiers.
rules.borders: 1px solid #CEC5B2 (border) or #BFA06A (gold). NEVER use shadows for structure.
rules.text: #0E2333 for headings and primary text, #6B6B6B for secondary text/bios.

headings.style: Normal, with strategic italicized accents wrapped in a span with gold color.

geometry.shadows: None on idle. Soft elegant shadow only on hover for cards.
geometry.spacing: Hyper-generous. Use p-12, p-16, gap-12 to let elements breathe.

layout_strategy.hierarchy: Three distinct structural layers separated by 1px rules or background color shifts.

section_header.eyebrow: Micro-label format with gold em-dash prefix: '— QUIÉNES SOMOS'
section_header.heading: DM Serif Display, massive (text-5xl or 6xl), navy. 'Las personas que te acompañan'
section_header.subheading: DM Sans, text-lg, ink-3, max-w-2xl. 'Psiquiatras, psicólogos y profesionales...'

direccion_tier.layout: 12-column CSS Grid. Josefina takes col-span-7, Trahice takes col-span-5. Trahice is vertically staggered down via margin-top (mt-12 or mt-24) to break symmetry.

card_anatomy.visual_box: A tall portrait ratio (e.g., aspect-[3/4]) box. Bg-navy. If no photo, display massive gold initials (DM Serif) in the center.
card_anatomy.content_box: White background, p-8 or p-10, 1px border. Visually overlaps the bottom-right corner of the visual_box by pulling it up and left using negative margins (-mt-20 -ml-12 on desktop) and relative z-10 positioning.

typography.name: DM Serif Display, text-3xl or 4xl, navy.
typography.bio: DM Sans, text-sm, ink-3, leading-relaxed, mt-4.
typography.credentials: List format, mt-4, space-y-2. text-xs, ink-3. Each item prefixed with a gold em-dash '—'.
typography.tags: Positioned at the bottom edge. Styled as editorial hallmarks (not pills). text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest text-navy, separated by small gold dots '·'.

equipo_tier.description: 8 team members in a refined grid.
equipo_tier.layout: Grid: 1 col (mobile), 2 cols (tablet), 4 cols (desktop). gap-6 or gap-8.

card_anatomy.container: White background, p-6, 1px border. Flex column, group.
card_anatomy.initials_block: 58x58 navy square, gold DM Serif initials.

typography.name: DM Serif Display, text-xl, navy, mt-6.
typography.bio: DM Sans, text-xs, ink-3, leading-relaxed, mt-4, border-t border-border/50 pt-4.
typography.tags: Editorial hallmark style, text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest text-navy separated by '·', mt-4.

card_anatomy.hover_state: Slight upward translation (-translate-y-1) and delicate shadow (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]). Transition duration-500 ease-out.

certifications_strip.description: Museum-plaque style typographic strip instead of standard logos.
certifications_strip.layout: Flex container, justify-between items-center, flex-wrap, gap-8, py-16, border-y border-border/50.

item_anatomy.acronym: DM Serif Display, text-2xl or 3xl, navy, italic variant allowed.
item_anatomy.full_name: DM Sans, text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-ink-3 max-w-[150px]

footer_update.description: Integrate the 5 affiliations cleanly above the copyright.
footer_update.layout: Add a pre-footer row. 1px gold/border divider above it. Render the certifications identically to the strip above, but scaled down 20% to fit neatly without bloating.

surprise_and_delight_moments.name: Asymmetrical Overlap (Dirección)
surprise_and_delight_moments.description: Instead of standard stacking, the biography text box physically overlaps the portrait frame by intersecting its corner, evoking a high-end printed magazine layout.

surprise_and_delight_moments.name: Museum Plaque Certifications
surprise_and_delight_moments.description: Ditching messy logos (especially since APA, SEETP, Zepp lack them here) in favor of a stark, ultra-minimalist typographic lockup (Large Serif Acronym + gold line + micro-tracking full name) makes the institute look like an Ivy League research center.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use markdown to wrap code. You are directly modifying React/JS components.
Update /app/frontend/src/data/site.js to include all new team members categorized as 'direccion' and 'clinico'. Add an array for 'certifications'.
Rewrite Sections2.jsx to implement this 3-tier hierarchy.
Update Footer.jsx to include the certifications strip.
Ensure all CSS classes use Tailwind. Any custom micro-CSS goes to App.css if necessary, but Tailwind is preferred.
Stick rigidly to the 0px border-radius rule. Everything must be a sharp rectangle.
